title: How to Resell Usage-Based Apps in GoHighLevel — New Revenue
description: Learn how Indian digital marketing agencies can resell usage-based apps in GoHighLevel with markups. Step-by-step guide to unlock new recurring revenue streams.
html_content:
🚀 Try GoHighLevel FREE for 30 days — No credit card required. Start your free trial here →

How to Resell Usage-Based Apps in GoHighLevel — New Revenue Stream for Indian Agencies

You're running a digital marketing agency in India. Maybe you're based in Bangalore, Mumbai, or Hyderabad. Your team is lean — probably 5-8 people max. You're managing clients across multiple cities, juggling WhatsApp, email, Instagram, and trying to keep everyone happy on tight margins.

Here's the hard truth: most Indian agencies operate on 15-20% net profit margins. You're trapped between rising salaries, expensive tools, and clients who won't pay more than ₹50,000-₹2,00,000 per month for managed services.

But what if you could unlock a second revenue stream that requires almost zero additional work? A stream that grows as your clients succeed?

The Problem: Scaling Revenue Without Scaling Headcount

Most agencies we talk to face the same bottleneck:

  • You're trading time for money. More clients = more team members = more overhead = same profit percentage.
  • Your clients need more tools. WhatsApp Business API automation, lead scoring, broadcast capabilities, CRM integrations — but you can't build everything.
  • Third-party apps are eating your margin. When clients discover they need Zapier, Integromat, or Zoho CRM integrations, they buy direct. You lose the relationship and the revenue.

Sound familiar? This is where usage-based app reselling in GoHighLevel changes everything.

What Are Usage-Based Apps in GoHighLevel?

GoHighLevel's Marketplace isn't just a collection of integrations. It's a rebillable revenue engine.

Usage-based apps charge clients based on consumption — WhatsApp messages sent, emails sent, API calls made, or contacts stored. Instead of letting your client pay the developer directly (and missing out), you resell the app with a markup, and GoHighLevel handles billing automatically.

Example: A WhatsApp Business API automation tool costs ₹500 per 10,000 messages at developer pricing. You markup 40% and charge clients ₹700 per 10,000 messages. The difference is pure margin — and it scales infinitely across all your sub-accounts.

💡 Quick Math for Your Agency

If you have 20 clients and earn a 35% markup on usage-based apps:

  • Average client spends ₹15,000/month on app usage
  • Your markup: ₹5,250/month per client
  • Across 20 clients: ₹1,05,000/month = ₹12.6 lakhs/year in pure profit
  • No additional team needed. No extra work. Just setup once.

Real Case: Mumbai-Based SaaS Agency

Akshay runs a digital marketing agency in Mumbai with 12 team members serving 40-50 active clients. He was stuck at ₹25 lakhs/month revenue with 18% profit margins.

He implemented usage-based app reselling in GoHighLevel:

  • Month 1: 8 clients adopted WhatsApp Business API automation (₹4,000/month markup across all)
  • Month 2: 5 clients added CRM + email integration tools (₹7,000/month markup)
  • Month 3: Organic upsell — clients discovering new tools in the Marketplace
  • After 90 days: +₹18,000/month in new recurring revenue. Profit margin jumped from 18% to 24%.

No new hires. No new pitching. Just smarter monetization.

How to Set This Up (4 Simple Steps)

Step 1: Enable Agency Reselling

Log into your GoHighLevel account (Agency plan required — ₹24,700/month or $297/month). Navigate to Marketplace → Settings → Agency Reselling. Toggle "Allow reselling of usage-based apps" ON.

That's it. GoHighLevel now allows you to apply markups.

Step 2: Find and Install Usage-Based Apps

Go to Marketplace → Apps. Filter by "Usage-Based Pricing." Popular options for Indian agencies:

  • WhatsApp Business API Automation: Send bulk messages, segment contacts, track opens — native support for Indian WhatsApp compliance
  • Email & Broadcast Tools: Scale communications with Razorpay/UPI payment integration support
  • CRM Extensions: Compete with Zoho CRM integrations but under your brand, with full DPDP Act compliance
  • AI Writing Assistants: Help clients create content at scale

Install the apps you want to resell. They'll appear in your sub-account dashboards automatically.

Step 3: Set Your Markup Pricing

For each usage-based app, define your margin:

  • Conservative (20-25% markup): Better for competitive positioning, sticky clients
  • Moderate (30-40% markup): Sweet spot for most Indian agencies (covers support, GST compliance overhead)
  • Aggressive (50%+ markup): Only if you're bundling with premium support

Pro tip: Don't hide the markups. Position it as "managed usage + support + optimization." Clients understand they're paying for convenience, not just the tool.

Step 4: Clients See It On Their Invoice

When your client logs into their GoHighLevel sub-account, they see the app usage dashboard. As they use it (send WhatsApp messages, create emails, store contacts), charges accumulate. At month-end, it appears on their GoHighLevel invoice — they pay you, you pay the developer, the difference is yours.

Completely transparent. Completely scalable.

Maximizing Revenue Without Overwhelming Clients

Don't activate everything at once. Follow this sequence:

  • Month 1: Install WhatsApp Business API automation (highest demand in India)
  • Month 2: Add email/broadcast tools when clients ask for larger-scale communication capability
  • Month 3: Introduce CRM extensions and AI writing tools based on use cases

Each new tool should solve a specific client problem. When it does, adoption is organic and billing feels natural.

Handling GST, DPDP Compliance, and Payment Processing

GoHighLevel handles the app charges on your invoice to clients. When it comes time to pay, you collect via:

  • Razorpay/PayU: Most Indian agencies use these for client billing — GoHighLevel integrates seamlessly
  • UPI: For smaller clients, direct UPI payments to your business account
  • Bank transfer: Standard for larger contracts

GST Note: App reselling is considered a service. You'll need to apply GST to your markup (18% standard rate). Keep your GoHighLevel invoices for GST filing — they're your proof of purchase.

DPDP Act Compliance: When storing client contacts and data in CRM extensions, ensure your terms explicitly mention DPDP Act compliance. GoHighLevel and most Marketplace apps meet these requirements, but document it for your clients' peace of mind.

Why This Works for Lean Indian Teams

You're probably running 5-8 people. You can't hire a developer for every tool request. You can't build custom solutions for every client problem.

But you CAN:

  • Resell proven tools with your markup
  • Let the developer handle updates and support
  • Focus your team on strategy and implementation — not tool building
  • Scale revenue without scaling headcount

This is why agencies in Bangalore, Pune, and Hyderabad are already doing this. And why your competitors will catch on in the next 6 months.

FAQ

Q: Do I need an Agency plan to resell usage-based apps?

A: Yes. The Agency plan (₹24,700/month or $297/month) includes reselling capabilities. Starter plan ($97/month or ~₹8,000/month) doesn't support this.

Q: What if my client doesn't use the app? Do they still pay?

A: No. Usage-based means they only pay for what they consume. Zero usage = zero charge. This makes it an easy sell.

Q: Can I control which apps appear in my clients' accounts?

A: Yes. You decide which apps to install. Only the ones you've activated will show up for your sub-accounts.

Q: How do I support my clients on tool usage if I don't know the app inside-out?

A: Most GoHighLevel Marketplace apps include built-in help docs and tutorials. You position yourself as the "implementation and strategy partner," not the tool expert.

Q: Are WhatsApp apps compliant with Indian regulations?

A: Yes. GoHighLevel Marketplace apps using WhatsApp Business API are built for DPDP Act compliance. Always review specific terms with your provider, and include this compliance assurance in your client agreements.

Your Next Step

Stop leaving money on the table. Your clients are already asking for WhatsApp automation, broadcast tools, and CRM features. The only question is: will they pay YOU or someone else?

Start your 30-day free trial of GoHighLevel today and explore the Marketplace. No credit card required. See firsthand how you can build a second revenue stream in the next 90 days.

The agencies that do this first in their markets win. Your competitors are already making this move. Act now, or fall behind.
